meaning: n.缎带,丝带,带,带状物,带子
examples: The road was a ribbon of moonlight.
She had tied back her hair with a peach satin ribbon.
Mrs. Haines stood nearby, holding scissors to cut a ribbon.
Highway 2 is a ribbon of two-lane road that stretches across the entirety of Washington state.
When they arrived, one prisoner was made to cut a pink ribbon for the cameras.
